title: Opening for Software Engineer at Manipal Digital Health

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Manipal Digital Health
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
